productDisplayName: Nike Women Downshifter White Sports Shoes
description: Enjoy your runs in style with the nike Downshifter 3 MSL running shoe. Lightweight and stylish, this pair is worth the add in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees.UpperSynthetic leather upper with mesh strips on the back foot for breathability and structural comfort Meshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for snug Fit and comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Synthetic overlays with swooshes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption Encapsulated Air-Sole unit for enhanced cushioning External heel counter to lock the foot in placeOutsoleBRS 1000 rubber outsole for durability Rubber shank for absolute midfoot support and torsional rigidity through midstance Forefoot flex grooves for smooth transition Heel scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protection Multi-directional and multi-depth rectangular and triangle lugs in the forefoot and heel for better gripShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
